이사야 3:1.content: For, behold, the Lord, Yahweh of Armies, takes away from Jerusalem and from Judah supply and support, the whole supply of bread, and the whole supply of water;

이사야 3:2.content: the mighty man, the man of war, the judge, the prophet, the diviner, the elder,

이사야 3:3.content: the captain of fifty, the honorable man, the counselor, the skilled craftsman, and the clever enchanter.

이사야 3:4.content: I will give boys to be their princes, and children shall rule over them.

이사야 3:5.content: The people will be oppressed, everyone by another, and everyone by his neighbor. The child will behave himself proudly against the old man, and the wicked against the honorable.

이사야 3:6.content: Indeed a man shall take hold of his brother in the house of his father, saying, “You have clothing, you be our ruler, and let this ruin be under your hand.”

이사야 3:7.content: In that day he will cry out, saying, “I will not be a healer; for in my house is neither bread nor clothing. You shall not make me ruler of the people.”

이사야 3:8.content: For Jerusalem is ruined, and Judah is fallen; because their tongue and their doings are against Yahweh, to provoke the eyes of his glory.

이사야 3:9.content: The look of their faces testify against them. They parade their sin like Sodom. They don’t hide it. Woe to their soul! For they have brought disaster upon themselves.

이사야 3:10.content: Tell the righteous “Good!” For they shall eat the fruit of their deeds.

이사야 3:11.content: Woe to the wicked! Disaster is upon them; for the deeds of his hands will be paid back to him.

이사야 3:12.content: As for my people, children are their oppressors, and women rule over them. My people, those who lead you cause you to err, and destroy the way of your paths.

이사야 3:13.content: Yahweh stands up to contend, and stands to judge the peoples.

이사야 3:14.content: Yahweh will enter into judgment with the elders of his people and their leaders: “It is you who have eaten up the vineyard. The plunder of the poor is in your houses.

이사야 3:15.content: What do you mean that you crush my people, and grind the face of the poor?” says the Lord, Yahweh of Armies.

이사야 3:16.content: Moreover Yahweh said, “Because the daughters of Zion are arrogant, and walk with outstretched necks and flirting eyes, walking to trip as they go, jingling ornaments on their feet;

이사야 3:17.content: therefore the Lord brings sores on the crown of the head of the women of Zion, and Yahweh will make their scalps bald.”

이사야 3:18.content: In that day the Lord will take away the beauty of their anklets, the headbands, the crescent necklaces,

이사야 3:19.content: the earrings, the bracelets, the veils,

이사야 3:20.content: the headdresses, the ankle chains, the sashes, the perfume containers, the charms,

이사야 3:21.content: the signet rings, the nose rings,

이사야 3:22.content: the fine robes, the capes, the cloaks, the purses,

이사야 3:23.content: the hand mirrors, the fine linen garments, the tiaras, and the shawls.

이사야 3:24.content: It shall happen that instead of sweet spices, there shall be rottenness; instead of a belt, a rope; instead of well set hair, baldness; instead of a robe, a wearing of sackcloth; and branding instead of beauty.

이사야 3:25.content: Your men shall fall by the sword, and your mighty in the war.

이사야 3:26.content: Her gates shall lament and mourn. She shall be desolate and sit on the ground.
